Reklam Atölyesi won first place in ADventure Advertising Competition!

In the ADventure Advertising Competition organized by Boğaziçi University Business and Economics Club, two teams from KHAS Advertising Workshop stood out among 40 teams and 8 finalists.

KHAS Faculty of Communication students Tuba Tarık (Advertising) and Sıla Karataş (Radio, Television and Cinema) won the first place in the final, while the team formed by our students İlayda Su Güner (Advertising) and Tolga Demirci (Advertising) was among the eight finalists.

In the competition sponsored by Johnson&Johnson, our students had the chance to intern at the sponsoring company and realize their ideas.

We congratulate our students and wish them many more successes.
